\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{complexSqrt()}{complexSqrt()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{LayeredMediaUtils_8cpp_a50405603197731a46c864b0f39744ed0} 
\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} complex\+Sqrt (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{arg}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Computes the square root of a complex number with proper handling of negative imaginary parts. 

This function ensures correct computation of the square root for cases where the imaginary part is negative or zero to maintain consistency in branch cuts.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em arg} & The input complex number. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
The square root of the input complex number. 
\end{DoxyReturn}

void zgetrf\+\_\+ (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{dim1}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{dim2}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{a}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{lda}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{ipiv}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{info}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Computes the LU factorization of a general M-\/by-\/N matrix. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em dim1} & Number of rows of the matrix (for {\ttfamily zgetrf\+\_\+}). \\
\hline
{\em dim2} & Number of columns of the matrix (for {\ttfamily zgetrf\+\_\+}). \\
\hline
{\em a} & Pointer to the matrix to be factored or solved. \\
\hline
{\em lda} & Leading dimension of the matrix. \\
\hline
{\em ipiv} & Pointer to the pivot indices. \\
\hline
{\em info} & Output status (0 if successful). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

void zgetrs\+\_\+ (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{TRANS}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{N}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{NRHS}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{A}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{LDA}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{IPIV}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{B}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{LDB}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{INFO}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Solves a system of linear equations using the LU factorization. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em TRANS} & Specifies the form of the system of equations (\textquotesingle{}N\textquotesingle{} for no transpose, etc.). \\
\hline
{\em N} & Order of the coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em NRHS} & Number of right-\/hand sides. \\
\hline
{\em A} & Pointer to the LU-\/factored coefficient matrix. \\
\hline
{\em LDA} & Leading dimension of A. \\
\hline
{\em IPIV} & Pointer to the pivot indices from {\ttfamily zgetrf\+\_\+}. \\
\hline
{\em B} & Pointer to the right-\/hand side vector(s). \\
\hline
{\em LDB} & Leading dimension of B. \\
\hline
{\em INFO} & Output status (0 if successful). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
